summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Fleet OS Pricing Engine and Corporate Booking upgrades. All 22 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified all new features are working correctly including Services Management, Pricing Rules, Rate Cards, and upgraded Corporate Booking form with trip type, recurring options, vehicle selection, multi-employee booking, and pricing estimate display.
passed_tests: Rate Cards - POST /api/rate-cards (create rate card with pricing rules)
Corporate Bookings - POST /api/corporate/bookings (Round-Trip booking with return_time)
Pricing Estimate - POST /api/corporate/estimate-pricing (without vehicle - returns message)
Admin UI - Services Management page loads with Add Service modal
Admin UI - Pricing Rules page displays all pricing types (Per KM, Time-Based, Route-Based, Daily Rental)
Admin UI - Rate Cards page shows client-specific rate cards
Corporate UI - Dashboard shows stats (Total Bookings, Active Trips, Employees, Monthly Cost)
Corporate UI - Bookings page displays bookings with new fields (Trip Type, Vehicle, Service, Passengers, Est. Cost)
Corporate UI - Create Booking modal has all new fields (Trip Type, Service Type, Vehicle Preference, Recurring options, Multi-employee selection)
seed_data_creation: Created test services, pricing rules (Per KM, Time-Based, Route-Based, Daily Rental), rate cards, and bookings (one-way, round-trip, recurring, multi-employee) during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Pricing Engine features (Services, Pricing Rules, Rate Cards) and Corporate Booking upgrades (Trip Type, Recurring, Vehicle Selection, Multi-Employee, Pricing Estimate) are fully functional. Backend APIs return correct data. Frontend UI displays all new fields correctly. Pricing estimate API returns correct values (e.g., ₹1390 for Time-Based 8hr/80km package for Delhi-Gurugram route). Existing test data includes pricing rules for SEDAN (Per KM at ₹12.5/km, Time-Based at 8hr/80km for ₹1390, Route-Based Delhi→Gurugram at ₹800/₹1400) and rate card '2026 rates' for Tech Corp India.

admin_pricing_engine.services_page: Working - CRUD operations functional, displays service types (AIRPORT_TRANSFER, OUTSTATION, etc.)
admin_pricing_engine.pricing_rules_page: Working - All pricing types displayed (PER_KM, TIME_BASED, ROUTE_BASED, DAILY_RENTAL)
admin_pricing_engine.rate_cards_page: Working - Client-specific rate cards with pricing rules

corporate_booking_form.trip_type_selection: Working - One Way / Round Trip options
corporate_booking_form.return_time_field: Working - Appears when Round Trip selected
corporate_booking_form.vehicle_preference: Working - Dropdown with SEDAN, SUV, HATCHBACK, EV, LUXURY
corporate_booking_form.service_type: Working - Dropdown with AIRPORT_TRANSFER, LOCAL_DUTY, OUTSTATION, EMPLOYEE_TRANSPORT, CUSTOM
corporate_booking_form.recurring_booking: Working - Daily/Weekly/Monthly options with weekday selection for Weekly
corporate_booking_form.multi_employee_booking: Working - Checkbox selection for additional passengers
corporate_booking_form.pricing_estimate_api: Working - Returns estimated cost based on rate card and pricing rules
